dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal detects strong trending days using body_pct (body as % of range) as proxy for extreme open-to-close moves. Entry triggers on continuation momentum (open direction matching previous close direction) within first bar. Long entry when close > pivot (upper half); Short entry when close < pivot (lower half). Exits at yesterday's open (prev_open) for mean reversion target. Stop loss set to 1.0 ATR approximation using 1% of entry price. Direction is context-dependent based on previous day's close relative to open.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal detects strong trending days using body_pct (body as % of range) as proxy for extreme open-to-close moves. Entry triggers on continuation momentum (open direction matching previous close direction) within first bar. Long entry when close > pivot (upper half); Short entry when close < pivot (lower half). Exits at yesterday's open (prev_open) for mean reversion target. Stop loss set to 1.0 ATR approximation using 1% of entry price. Direction is context-dependent based on previous day's close relative to open.

source_rule_text: When the market exhibits a strong trending day (opening at one extreme and closing at the other), expect mean reversion the following day; fade the opening direction momentum in favor of a reversal bias.
